mapper.select: select q.id as quId, q.qu_type as quType, q.content as quTitle, q.image as quImg, eqa.user_id, eqa.exam_id, eqa.answer_content as answer, ( select group_concat(o2.content order by o2.sort separator ' / ') from t_option o2 where o2.qu_id = q.id and o2.is_right = 1 and (o2.is_deleted = 0 or o2.is_deleted is null) ) as refAnswer, eqa.ai_score as correctScore, eqa.ai_reason as aiReason, eq.score as totalScore from t_exam_qu_answer as eqa inner join t_question as q on eqa.question_id = q.id and q.is_deleted = 0 inner join t_exam_question as eq on eq.question_id = q.id and eq.exam_id = eqa.exam_id where eqa.question_type = 4 and q.qu_type = 4 and eqa.user_id = #{userId} and eqa.exam_id = #{examId} and (eqa.is_right is null or eqa.is_right <> 1)

SELECT q.id AS questionId, q.content AS questionContent, eq.score AS totalScore, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT o.content ORDER BY o.sort SEPARATOR '；') AS qusetionAnswer, q.analysis AS questionAnalysis, eqa.answer_content AS userAnswer FROM t_exam_qu_answer eqa JOIN t_exam_question eq ON eqa.question_id = eq.question_id AND eq.exam_id = eqa.exam_id JOIN t_question q ON eq.question_id = q.id AND q.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN t_option o ON o.qu_id = q.id AND o.is_deleted = 0 AND o.is_right = 1 WHERE eqa.exam_id = #{examId} AND eqa.user_id = #{userId} AND q.qu_type = 4 GROUP BY q.id, q.content, eq.score, q.analysis, eqa.answer_content
